temporal_description: A high-angle, shaky shot looks down into a dark, narrow stairwell. The audio opens with a tense, dramatic orchestral score, creating a sense of urgency and suspense. A man's voice, filled with panic and desperation, shouts, "Salinger!" The camera pans down, revealing a person in dark clothing at the top of the stairs. The person, a man, is shirtless and appears to be in a state of panic. He looks down into the stairwell below. The camera continues to move erratically, showing the dimly lit wooden banister and the dark, confined space of the stairwell. The man at the top of the stairs turns and begins to run down the stairs, his back to the camera. The camera follows his movement, maintaining a shaky, high-angle perspective. The man continues to descend the dark, wooden stairs, his form illuminated by a faint light source. The camera remains close to him, capturing his hurried descent. The man's voice is loud and strained, echoing slightly as if in a large, empty space, heightening the feeling of alarm and pursuit. The dramatic music continues to swell in the background, underscoring the high-stakes, perilous atmosphere of the scene.
